result.finding: validation/longchain_mechanism.py (ORYZA2000 biomass): free-only (monotone f_xy) long-chain (nC>=10) straw+grain log10 RMSE 2.026 (~100x); PFDA straw 0.08 vs 3.46, PFDoDA straw 0.33 vs 49.8 / grain 0.10 vs 45.5. refit_oryza.py: even f_xy=1/L_Ph=1 ceilings leave PFDoDA straw 14.6 vs 49.8 -- the Cw=C/B collapse throttles free loading regardless of f_xy.
